mapper.select: SELECT query_id queryId,query_id id, amazonauthid,marketplaceid,begin_date beginDate,end_date endDate, data_document_id dataDocumentId,document_url documentUrl,lastupdate from t_amz_data_kiosk_request where status=0 or data_document_id is null limit 20

select query_id queryId,query_id id,amazonauthid,marketplaceid,begin_date beginDate,end_date endDate, data_document_id dataDocumentId,document_url documentUrl,lastupdate from t_amz_data_kiosk_request where (status=1 or status=2) and data_document_id is not null limit 20
